# @tony-ui/core

> Angular 21 component library with Tailwind CSS v4 and Signals. Inspired by shadcn/ui.

- Package: @tony-ui/core
- Angular: >= 21.0.0
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS custom properties (--ton-* prefix)
- Reactivity: Angular Signals (input(), model(), output(), computed(), signal(), linkedSignal())
- Change Detection: Zoneless (provideZonelessChangeDetection())
- Forms: ControlValueAccessor on all form components
- Themes: light, dark, corporate (runtime switching via ThemeService)
- Documentation: https://coci-dev.github.io/tony-ui/
- GitHub: https://github.com/coci-dev/tony-ui

## Installation

```bash
ng add @tony-ui/core
```

Or manually:

```bash
npm install @tony-ui/core
```

```typescript
// app.config.ts
import { provideZonelessChangeDetection } from '@angular/core';
import { provideTonyUI } from '@tony-ui/core';

export const appConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideZonelessChangeDetection(),
    provideTonyUI({ defaultTheme: 'light' }),
  ],
};
```

```css
/* styles.css */
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@tony-ui/core/styles/sonny-theme.css";
```

## Components (60+)

### Button
- Selector: `button[tonBtn], a[tonBtn]`
- Import: `import { TonButtonDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'outline'|'secondary'|'ghost'|'link'), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg'|'icon'), disabled, loading, class
- Example: `<button tonBtn variant="outline" size="sm">Click</button>`

### Card
- Selectors: `[tonCard]`, `[tonCardHeader]`, `[tonCardTitle]`, `[tonCardDescription]`, `[tonCardContent]`, `[tonCardFooter]`
- Import: `import { TonCardDirective, TonCardHeaderDirective, TonCardTitleDirective, TonCardDescriptionDirective, TonCardContentDirective, TonCardFooterDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'outline'|'ghost'), padding ('none'|'sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<div tonCard padding="md"><div tonCardHeader><h3 tonCardTitle>Title</h3></div></div>`

### Input
- Selector: `input[tonInput], textarea[tonInput]`
- Import: `import { TonInputDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'error'|'success'), inputSize ('sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<input tonInput placeholder="Email" />`

### Textarea
- Selector: `textarea[tonTextarea]`
- Import: `import { TonTextareaDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant, textareaSize, resize, autoResize

### Badge
- Selector: `[tonBadge]`
- Import: `import { TonBadgeDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'secondary'|'destructive'|'outline'|'success'|'warning'), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg')
- Example: `<span tonBadge variant="success">Active</span>`

### Avatar
- Selector: `ton-avatar`
- Import: `import { TonAvatarComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: src, alt, fallback, size, variant

### Avatar Group
- Selector: `ton-avatar-group`
- Import: `import { TonAvatarGroupComponent, type AvatarGroupItem } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: items (required, AvatarGroupItem[]), max (default 3), size ('sm'|'md'|'lg'), spacing ('tight'|'normal')
- Example: `<ton-avatar-group [items]="users" [max]="3" />`

### Accordion
- Selectors: `[tonAccordion]`, `[tonAccordionItem]`, `[tonAccordionTrigger]`, `[tonAccordionContent]`
- Import: `import { TonAccordionDirective, TonAccordionItemDirective, TonAccordionTriggerDirective, TonAccordionContentDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: multi (boolean)

### Alert
- Selectors: `[tonAlert]`, `[tonAlertTitle]`, `[tonAlertDescription]`
- Import: `import { TonAlertDirective, TonAlertTitleDirective, TonAlertDescriptionDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'success'|'warning'|'info'), dismissible

### Select
- Selector: `ton-select`
- Import: `import { TonSelectComponent, type SelectOption } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: options (SelectOption[]), value (model, string), placeholder, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-select [options]="opts" [(value)]="selected" />`

### Combobox
- Selector: `ton-combobox`
- Import: `import { TonComboboxComponent, type ComboboxOption } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: options (ComboboxOption[]), value (model, string), placeholder, searchPlaceholder, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Calendar
- Selector: `ton-calendar`
- Import: `import { TonCalendarComponent, type DateRange, type CalendarMode } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, Date|null), mode ('single'|'range'), rangeValue (model, DateRange|null), min, max, locale, showNavigation, initialViewDate, borderless
- CVA: Yes

### Date Picker
- Selector: `ton-date-picker`
- Import: `import { TonDatePickerComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, Date|null), placeholder, size, locale, dateFormat (Intl.DateTimeFormatOptions), min, max, clearable, disabled
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-date-picker [(value)]="date" [clearable]="true" />`

### Date Range Picker
- Selector: `ton-date-range-picker`
- Import: `import { TonDateRangePickerComponent, type DateRange, type DatePickerPreset } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, DateRange|null), placeholder, size, locale, dateFormat, separator, dualCalendar, presets (DatePickerPreset[]), min, max, clearable, disabled
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-date-range-picker [(value)]="range" [dualCalendar]="true" [presets]="presets" />`

### Color Picker
- Selector: `ton-color-picker`
- Import: `import { TonColorPickerComponent, type ColorPickerPreset, type ColorFormat } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string '#hex'), format ('hex'|'rgb'|'hsl'), presets (ColorPickerPreset[]), showInput, showEyeDropper, showFavorites, inline, disabled, placeholder, size
- Outputs: colorChange, formatChange
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-color-picker [(value)]="color" [presets]="presets" [showFavorites]="true" />`

### Number Input
- Selector: `ton-number-input`
- Import: `import { TonNumberInputComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, number), min, max, step, disabled, size, placeholder
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-number-input [(value)]="count" [min]="0" [max]="100" [step]="5" />`

### OTP Input
- Selector: `ton-otp-input`
- Import: `import { TonOtpInputComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string), length (default 6), type ('number'|'alphanumeric'), size, disabled, mask, autoFocus, placeholder, separator (number|null), status ('idle'|'loading'|'success'|'error')
- Outputs: completed (string)
- CVA: Yes
- Example: `<ton-otp-input [(value)]="otp" [length]="6" [separator]="3" (completed)="verify($event)" />`

### Tag Input
- Selector: `ton-tag-input`
- Import: `import { TonTagInputComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string[]), placeholder, maxTags, allowDuplicates, removable, addOnBlur, separators (string[]), validate ((tag)=>boolean), disabled, size
- Outputs: tagAdded, tagRemoved
- CVA: Yes (string[])
- Example: `<ton-tag-input [(value)]="tags" [maxTags]="5" />`

### Data Table
- Selector: `ton-data-table`
- Import: `import { TonDataTableComponent, TonCellDefDirective, TonBulkActionsDefDirective, TonRowExpandDefDirective, type DataTableColumn } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: columns (required, DataTableColumn[]), data (required, Record[]), variant, density, hoverable, stickyHeader, selectable, paginated, filterable, showExport, showColumnToggle, expandable, loading, loadingRows, paginationConfig, trackBy, noDataText
- Models: selectedRows (Record[])
- Outputs: sortChanged, rowClicked, dataExported
- Template directives: tonCell (custom cells), tonHeaderCell (custom headers), tonBulkActions (bulk toolbar), tonRowExpand (expandable rows)
- tonCell context: `let-value` = cell value ($implicit), `let-row="row"` = full row object. Example: `<ng-template tonCell="status" let-value let-row="row"><span>{{ value }} for {{ row['name'] }}</span></ng-template>`

### Table
- Selectors: `table[tonTable]`, `thead[tonTableHeader]`, `tbody[tonTableBody]`, `tr[tonTableRow]`, `th[tonTableHead]`, `td[tonTableCell]`, `tfoot[tonTableFooter]`, `caption[tonTableCaption]`
- Import: `import { TonTableDirective, TonTableHeaderDirective, TonTableBodyDirective, TonTableRowDirective, TonTableHeadDirective, TonTableCellDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'striped'|'bordered'), density ('compact'|'normal'|'comfortable'), hoverable, stickyHeader

### Checkbox
- Selector: `input[type="checkbox"][tonCheckbox]`
- Import: `import { TonCheckboxDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: size

### Radio
- Selector: `input[type="radio"][tonRadio]`
- Import: `import { TonRadioDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: size

### Switch
- Selector: `ton-switch`
- Import: `import { TonSwitchComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: checked (model), disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Slider
- Selector: `ton-slider`
- Import: `import { TonSliderComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model), min, max, step, disabled, size
- CVA: Yes

### Toggle
- Selector: `button[tonToggle]`
- Import: `import { TonToggleDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant, size, pressed (model)
- CVA: Yes

### Rating
- Selector: `ton-rating`
- Import: `import { TonRatingComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model), max, readonly, size, half
- CVA: Yes

### File Input
- Selector: `ton-file-input`
- Import: `import { TonFileInputComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: accept, multiple, disabled, placeholder, variant, size, maxSize, value (model)
- Outputs: fileChange, error
- CVA: Yes

### Pagination
- Selector: `ton-pagination`
- Import: `import { TonPaginationComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: currentPage (model), totalPages (required), siblingCount, boundaryCount, size, variant

### Progress
- Selector: `ton-progress`
- Import: `import { TonProgressComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value, max, variant, size, indeterminate, label

### Radial Progress
- Selector: `ton-radial-progress`
- Import: `import { TonRadialProgressComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value, size, thickness, variant

### Loader
- Selector: `ton-loader`
- Import: `import { TonLoaderComponent } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('spinner'|'dots'|'bars'), size

### Skeleton
- Selector: `[tonSkeleton]`
- Import: `import { TonSkeletonDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('line'|'circular'|'rounded'), size

### Tooltip
- Selector: `[tonTooltip]`
- Import: `import { TonTooltipDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: tonTooltip (required, string), tooltipPosition, tooltipDelay, tooltipDisabled
- Example: `<button tonTooltip="Save changes">Save</button>`

### Popover
- Selectors: `[tonPopover]`, `[tonPopoverTrigger]`, `[tonPopoverContent]`
- Import: `import { TonPopoverDirective, TonPopoverTriggerDirective, TonPopoverContentDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: matchWidth, offset, closeOnOutside, closeOnEscape
- ExportAs: tonPopover (for template ref)
- Example: `<div tonPopover #pop="tonPopover"><button tonPopoverTrigger>Open</button><div tonPopoverContent class="p-4">Content</div></div>`

### Dropdown Menu
- Selectors: `[tonDropdown]`, `[tonDropdownTrigger]`, `[tonDropdownContent]`, `[tonMenuItem]`, `[tonMenuSeparator]`, `[tonMenuLabel]`
- Import: `import { TonDropdownDirective, TonDropdownTriggerDirective, TonDropdownContentDirective, TonMenuItemDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`

### Command Palette
- Service: `TonCommandPaletteService`
- Import: `import { TonCommandPaletteService, type Command } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Usage: `this.commandPalette.open({ commands: [...], placeholder: 'Type a command...' })`
- Command interface: { id, label, action, description?, icon?, group?, keywords?, shortcut?, disabled? }

### Modal / Dialog
- Service: `TonDialogService`
- Import: `import { TonDialogService } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Usage: `this.dialogService.open(MyComponent, { width: '28rem', data: {...} })`
- Directives: tonDialogHeader, tonDialogTitle, tonDialogDescription, tonDialogContent, tonDialogFooter, tonDialogClose

### Sheet
- Import: `import { TonSheetHeaderDirective, TonSheetTitleDirective, TonSheetContentDirective, TonSheetCloseDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Opened via TonDialogService with sheet panel class

### Toast
- Service: `TonToastService`
- Import: `import { TonToastService } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Selector: `ton-toaster` (place in root template)
- Usage: `this.toastService.success('Title', 'Description')`
- Methods: success, error, warning, info
- Inputs: position, maxToasts

### Alert
- Selector: `[tonAlert]`
- Import: `import { TonAlertDirective, TonAlertTitleDirective, TonAlertDescriptionDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'destructive'|'success'|'warning'|'info'), dismissible

### Tabs
- Selectors: `[tonTabs]`, `[tonTabsList]`, `[tonTabsTrigger]`, `[tonTabsContent]`
- Import: `import { TonTabsDirective, TonTabsListDirective, TonTabsTriggerDirective, TonTabsContentDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- Inputs: value (model, string)

### Accordion
- Selectors: `[tonAccordion]`, `[tonAccordionItem]`, `[tonAccordionTrigger]`, `[tonAccordionContent]`
- Inputs: multi (boolean)

### Steps
- Selectors: `[tonSteps]`, `[tonStep]`
- Inputs: orientation, size (steps); status ('default'|'active'|'complete'|'error'), icon (step)

### Timeline
- Selectors: `[tonTimeline]`, `[tonTimelineItem]`, `[tonTimelineStart]`, `[tonTimelineMiddle]`, `[tonTimelineEnd]`
- Inputs: orientation (timeline); connect (item); variant (middle)

### Breadcrumb
- Selectors: `nav[tonBreadcrumb]`, `ol[tonBreadcrumbList]`, `li[tonBreadcrumbItem]`, `[tonBreadcrumbLink]`, `[tonBreadcrumbSeparator]`, `[tonBreadcrumbPage]`

### Navbar
- Selectors: `[tonNavbar]`, `[tonNavbarBrand]`, `[tonNavbarContent]`, `[tonNavbarEnd]`
- Inputs: variant ('default'|'bordered'|'floating'), sticky

### Divider
- Selector: `ton-divider`
- Inputs: orientation, variant, label

### Stat
- Selectors: `[tonStat]`, `[tonStatTitle]`, `[tonStatValue]`, `[tonStatDescription]`, `[tonStatFigure]`

### Status
- Selector: `[tonStatus]`
- Inputs: variant, size, pulse

### Indicator
- Selectors: `[tonIndicator]`, `[tonIndicatorBadge]`
- Inputs: position, variant, ariaLabel

### Kbd
- Selector: `kbd[tonKbd]`
- Inputs: size

### Link
- Selector: `a[tonLink]`
- Inputs: variant

### List
- Selectors: `[tonList]`, `[tonListItem]`, `[tonListItemIcon]`, `[tonListItemContent]`, `[tonListItemAction]`

### Carousel
- Selectors: `[tonCarousel]`, `[tonCarouselContent]`, `[tonCarouselItem]`, `[tonCarouselPrev]`, `[tonCarouselNext]`
- Inputs: orientation, loop, autoplay

### Chat Bubble
- Selectors: `[tonChatBubble]`, `[tonChatBubbleAvatar]`, `[tonChatBubbleHeader]`, `[tonChatBubbleContent]`, `[tonChatBubbleBody]`, `[tonChatBubbleFooter]`
- Inputs: align ('start'|'end')

### Dock
- Selectors: `[tonDock]`, `[tonDockItem]`
- Inputs: position, class (dock); active (item)

### Drawer
- Selectors: `[tonDrawerLayout]`, `[tonDrawerContent]`, `[tonDrawerSide]`
- Import: `import { TonDrawerLayoutComponent, TonDrawerContentDirective, TonDrawerSideDirective } from '@tony-ui/core';`
- TonDrawerLayoutComponent: exportAs `tonDrawerLayout`, methods: open(), close(), toggle(), isOpen signal (read-only, not two-way bindable)
- Inputs: overlay (boolean, default true), side ('left'|'right')
- Usage: `<div tonDrawerLayout #drawer="tonDrawerLayout">` then `drawer.toggle()` to control

### FAB
- Selectors: `[tonFab]`, `[tonFabTrigger]`, `[tonFabAction]`
- Inputs: position, direction

### Fieldset
- Selectors: `fieldset[tonFieldset]`, `legend[tonFieldsetLegend]`, `[tonFieldsetContent]`
- Inputs: variant, disabled

### Diff
- Selector: `ton-diff`
- Inputs: value (model), orientation

### Validator
- Selectors: `[tonValidator]`, `[tonValidatorHint]`
- Inputs: control, state (validator); when, type, variant (hint)

### Button Group
- Selector: `[tonButtonGroup]`
- Inputs: orientation

## Theming

Three built-in themes: light (default), dark, corporate.

```typescript
import { ThemeService } from '@tony-ui/core';
themeService = inject(ThemeService);
themeService.setTheme('dark');
```

CSS custom properties: --ton-background, --ton-foreground, --ton-primary, --ton-primary-foreground, --ton-secondary, --ton-secondary-foreground, --ton-accent, --ton-accent-foreground, --ton-muted, --ton-muted-foreground, --ton-destructive, --ton-destructive-foreground, --ton-border, --ton-ring, --ton-radius

## Key Patterns

- All components use `input()` signal API (no @Input decorators)
- Two-way binding uses `model()` with `[(value)]="signal"` syntax
- Form components implement ControlValueAccessor for `[formControl]` / `formControlName`
- Styling uses CVA (class-variance-authority) + `cn()` utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- All components are standalone
- All components use ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
